channel.title: mountain on Cédric Walter blog
channel.description: Recent content in mountain on Cédric Walter blog
channel.copyright: Reproduction without explicit permission is prohibited. All Rights Reserved. All photos remain copyright © their rightful owners. No copyright infringement is intended.

item.title: The perfect equipment for via ferrata
item.description: Via ferrata is a mountain activity that involves climbing routes equipped with fixed cables, ladders, bridges, and other aids to assist climbers along exposed and challenging terrain. Proper equipment is essential to ensure safety and comfort during via ferrata climbing. Here ’s a list of the essential equipment for via ferrata Helmet: A climbing helmet is crucial to protect your head from falling rocks, debris, and potential impacts. You head has no price tag, so invest in a good one, and always wear it!

item.title: Grimsel Pass
item.description: The Grimsel Pass (German: Grimselpass; French: Col du Grimsel; Italian: Passo del Grimsel) is a mountain pass in Switzerland, crossing the Bernese Alps at an elevation of 2,164 metres (7,100 ft). The pass connects the Haslital, the upper valley of the river Aare, with the upper valley of the Rhône. In so doing, and as the Aare is a tributary of the Rhine, the pass crosses the continental divide between the North Sea and the Mediterranean Sea.

item.title: Tasmania Cradle Mountain
item.description: Cradle Mountain is a mountain in the Central Highlands region of the Australian state of Tasmania. The mountain is situated in the Cradle Mountain-Lake St Clair National Park. At 1,545 meters (5,069 ft) above sea level, it is the sixth-highest mountain in Tasmania.

item.title: Eiger in the the Bernese Alps
item.description: The Eiger is a 3,967-metre mountain of the Bernese Alps, overlooking Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen in the Bernese Oberland of Switzerland, just north of the main watershed and border with Valais. ## Visiting an Alphorn manufacture Alphorns are traditional Swiss folkmusic instrument
